action.description:
Introduced by Senators L. Johnson, Ratcliff, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Hesselbein, Larson, Spreitzer, Roys, Habush Sinykin and Wirch; 
cosponsored by Representatives Joers, Mayadev, Spaude, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Billings, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Hong, J.
